zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBEC於大約1255年出生在法國諾門迪曼其布利可貝時，她的父親Robert VI Bertrand de Bricquebec26歲，母親Alix de Tancarville de Serans24歲。她和Robert VI dit Passemer d'ESTOUTEVILLE至少有5個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1311年享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBEC于大约1255年出生在法国諾門迪曼其布利可貝时，她的父亲Robert VI Bertrand de Bricquebec26岁，母亲Alix de Tancarville de Serans24岁。她和Robert VI dit Passemer d'ESTOUTEVILLE至少有5个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1311年享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: BERTRAN
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Jorge, Eduardo, Enrique, Joaquin, Ricardo, Aleida, Ana, Ana Maria, Elena, Felipe, Jeronimo.  French Andre.
French, Occitan, and Catalan: variant of   Bertram   or   Bertrand  .

variants.name: Bertram
meanings: German, English (mainly in southeastern Scotland, of Norman origin), French, and Danish: from the ancient Germanic personal name Bertram, composed of the elements berht ‘bright, famous’ + hramn ‘raven’. The raven was the bird of Odin, king of the gods, in ancient Germanic mythology. The personal name was common in France throughout the Middle Ages (especially in the form Bertrand ), where its popularity was increased by the fame of the troubadour Bertrand de Born (c. 1140–1214). The name was taken to England by the Normans in the forms Bertran(d), Bertram, and Bartram.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBEC was born about 1255, in Bricquebec, Manche, Normandy, France, her father, Robert VI Bertrand de Bricquebec, was 26 and her mother, Alix de Tancarville de Serans, was 24. She had at least 5 sons and 3 daughters with Robert VI dit Passemer d'ESTOUTEVILLE. She died in 1311, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBEC est née environ 1255, à Bricquebec, Manche, Normandie, France, son père, Robert VI Bertrand de Bricquebec, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alix de Tancarville de Serans, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles avec Robert VI dit Passemer d'ESTOUTEVILLE. Elle est décédée en 1311, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBEC um 1255 in Bricquebec, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert VI Bertrand de Bricquebec 26 und ihre Mutter Alix de Tancarville de Serans 24. Sie hatte mit Robert VI dit Passemer d'ESTOUTEVILLE mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1311 im Alter von 57 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBEC è nata il circa 1255 nel Bricquebec, Manche, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Robert VI Bertrand de Bricquebec, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Alix de Tancarville de Serans, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie con Robert VI dit Passemer d'ESTOUTEVILLE. Morì nel 1311, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBECが約1255年にフランスノーマンディマンチェブリククエベックで生まれた時，父Robert VI Bertrand de Bricquebecは26歳，母Alix de Tancarville de Seransは24歳であった。彼女はRobert VI dit Passemer d'ESTOUTEVILLEとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1311年に57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBEC(이)가 대략 1255년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 브릭크베크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert VI Bertrand de Bricquebec(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix de Tancarville de Serans(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Robert VI dit Passemer d'ESTOUTEVILLE(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1311년 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBEC nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Bricquebec, Manche, Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert VI Bertrand de Bricquebec, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Tancarville de Serans, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas com Robert VI dit Passemer d'ESTOUTEVILLE. Ela faleceu em 1311, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBEC родилась около 1255 г. в местности бриккуебек, манч, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert VI Bertrand de Bricquebec было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix de Tancarville de Serans, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери от Robert VI dit Passemer d'ESTOUTEVILLE. Она умерла в 1311 г. в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne Alix BERTRAN de BRICQUEBEC nació aproximadamente 1255, en Bricquebec, Manche, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Robert VI Bertrand de Bricquebec, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Alix de Tancarville de Serans, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas con Robert VI dit Passemer d'ESTOUTEVILLE. Murió en 1311, a la edad de 57 años.
